_description: HealthCheck module — all backend API success and informational messages. All message strings must originate from this file.

config.downtimeSourceSaved: Planned downtime source configuration saved successfully.

poller.started: Health poller started. Polling {count} application(s) every {interval} seconds.
poller.pollComplete: Poll cycle complete. {up} UP, {down} DOWN out of {total} application(s).
poller.manualPollComplete: Manual poll complete. {up} UP, {down} DOWN out of {total} application(s).

plannedDowntime.synced: Planned downtime synced from ServiceNow. {count} entries imported.

data.loaded: Default data loaded successfully. Seeded {tables} table(s), inserted {rows} row(s).
data.reset: Module data deleted. Dropped {dropped} table(s) ({rows} row(s)), {skipped} not found, {errors} error(s).
